name: Frank's Tire Service

name: Cross Bronx Tire Inc
description: Tire shop located directly on the Cross Bronx Expressway (I-95) service road handling tire sales and repair.

name: Maximus Tire Shop
description: Tire shop fronting the Cross Bronx Expressway (I-95) offering tire sales and repair.

name: Universe Towing
description: NYPD-authorized towing service for I-95 (New England Thruway) offering light, medium and heavy-duty towing and recovery, open 24 hours.

name: Bronx 5 Star Truck Wash
